text: Surrounded by innovation and abstract artifice, I am struck by the clarity and intentionality of this space. The stark, bright openness of the first scene feels expectant, even a bit cold—its emptiness draws my thoughts toward potential and anticipation. In the second, the visual and textual cacophony invites me to reflect on how research and development are not merely technical endeavors, but also philosophical ones—each new device or display is both a question and an answer, material and metaphor. I feel curious but slightly detached, sensing that I am both observer and subject in this habitat of ideas.
